title: Planning approved: 8-unit Demolition Of Storage Buildings, Construction Of 6 New Dwellings, Conversion A in Chelmsford
excerpt: Chelmsford City Council has approved 8 residential units at Barns West Of Claydons Farm Bungalow Back Lane East Hanningfield Chelmsford. Local sold-price evidence indicates a median price of £395,000; high-level 70% LTGDV senior debt would be approximately £2,212,000.
body:
## Chelmsford planning approval

Chelmsford City Council has approved planning application 26/00122/FUL for 8 residential units at Barns West Of Claydons Farm Bungalow Back Lane East Hanningfield Chelmsford. The approved proposal is: Demolition Of Storage Buildings, Construction Of 6 New Dwellings, Conversion And Extension Of 2 Curtilage Listed Buildings, To Create A Total Of 8 Dwellings Along With Landscaping, Parking, Biodiversity Enhancement Measures And Other Associated Infrastruc

The application was decided on 22/04/2026. Construction Capital has reviewed the local market data for Chelmsford, Essex to provide a high-level funding view for the site.

## Local sold-price evidence

HM Land Registry sold-price data for Chelmsford shows a median residential sale price of £395,000 across 1,772 transactions in the last 12 months. The year-on-year price movement is -1.2%.

| Recent local sale | Price | Date | Type |
|---|---:|---|---|
| 111, POLLARDS GREEN | £420,000 | 2026-02-27 | T |
| 29, CHELMER ROAD | £263,000 | 2026-02-20 | F |
| 34, THE RAY | £180,000 | 2026-02-20 | F |
| 31, STANSTED CLOSE | £350,000 | 2026-02-20 | T |
| 3, MAYNE CREST | £365,000 | 2026-02-20 | S |

## High-level indicative development finance

Using the available planning and sold-price data, the scheme has an estimated GDV of £3,160,000. At 70% LTGDV, that implies a high-level indicative senior debt facility of approximately £2,212,000.

This is not a credit-backed offer and remains subject to valuation, cost plan, borrower experience, planning documentation, lender appetite, and full underwriting. For a live scheme, Construction Capital can approach the lender panel and provide formal indicative terms within 24 hours.

## Speak to Construction Capital

Construction Capital arranges senior debt, mezzanine finance, bridging loans and equity/JV funding for UK property developers. If you are progressing this site or a similar consented scheme, submit the details through the deal room and we will come back with lender options.
author: Matt Lenzie

data_sources.label: HM Land Registry sold-price data - Chelmsford

The approved proposal is: Approval of Reserved Matters application for appearance and scale relating to Outline approval LW/20/0133 for the demolition of four redundant poultry barns and erection of four detached dwellings with parking provision and soft landscaping

title: Planning approved: 2-unit Proposal For 2 X Semi-Detached Dwellings in Sutton In Ashfield
excerpt: Ashfield District Council has approved 2 residential units at 2 Milldale Walk, Sutton In Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, NG17 2DJ. Local sold-price evidence indicates a median price of £195,000 (fallback median); high-level 70% LTGDV senior debt would be approximately £273,000.
body:
## Sutton In Ashfield planning approval

Ashfield District Council has approved planning application V/2026/0092 for 2 residential units at 2 Milldale Walk, Sutton In Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, NG17 2DJ. The approved proposal is: Proposal For 2 X Semi-Detached Dwellings

The application was decided on 24/04/2026. Construction Capital has reviewed the local market data for Sutton In Ashfield, Nottinghamshire to provide a high-level funding view for the site.

## Local sold-price evidence

Town-level sold-price evidence is not currently available in the local dataset for Sutton In Ashfield. For the first-pass funding view, Construction Capital has used a fallback median of £195,000 (fallback median); this should be replaced with scheme-specific comparable evidence before issuing formal terms.

Recent comparable transactions are not currently available for this town dataset.

## High-level indicative development finance

Using the available planning and sold-price data, the scheme has an estimated GDV of £390,000. At 70% LTGDV, that implies a high-level indicative senior debt facility of approximately £273,000.

This is not a credit-backed offer and remains subject to valuation, cost plan, borrower experience, planning documentation, lender appetite, and full underwriting. For a live scheme, Construction Capital can approach the lender panel and provide formal indicative terms within 24 hours.
